name: newsletter-sections
title: Newsletter Sections
author: Toby Belhome
description: Engage and grow your audience with beautifully designed Tailwind CSS newsletter sections. These layouts combine clean forms, compelling copy, and subtle visuals to encourage sign-ups. Perfect for blogs, SaaS products, and marketing sites looking to build an email list with a modern and conversion-focused approach.
